questions.question_text_full: On the occasion of Republic Day, a retail store offers a scheme where customers can avail a discount of 26% on their total purchase. If Manish buys items worth ₹2,050, how much money (in ₹) will he save through the scheme discount?
questions.notes: The options are labeled a, b, c, d in the image, mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.

questions.question_text_full: Vessel A contains milk and water in the ratio 4 : 5. Vessel B contains milk and water in the ratio 2 : 1. If x litres mixture of A is mixed with y litres mixture of B, then the ratio of milk to water in the mixture becomes 8 : 5. Find the ratio x : y.
questions.notes: The options are labeled a, b, c, d in the image, mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.
